summary: Phase 8 Football Search & Selection Engine testing completed. All major features verified: backend API returns Phase 8 metadata with skipped_low_relevance entries, football_quality scoring correctly classifies leagues (Premier League→Tier 1, Botswana→Tier 4), frontend displays quality badges on pick cards with tier/score format, skipped section shows 4 exotic/low-quality leagues with state badges and reasons, language toggle ES/EN works correctly.

minor_issues.issue: get_competition_meta('Botswana Premier League') returns tier_1 due to substring matching 'Premier League'
minor_issues.impact: LOW - This is corrected by football_quality.py layer which applies country-hint logic and correctly demotes to tier 4
minor_issues.note: This is a known limitation of the substring fallback mechanism. The production code path uses football_quality.py which correctly handles this case.

passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/picks/today?sport=football returns pick_run with Phase 8 metadata
Backend: pick_run.payload.summary.skipped_low_relevance contains 4 entries
Backend: All skipped entries have valid states (EXOTIC_LEAGUE_WARNING, LOW_MARKET_SUPPORT, LOW_DATA_QUALITY)
Backend: pick_run.payload._pipeline.football_quality.cascade_used == [1, 2]
Backend: All 4 picks expose _football_quality with state, tier, score, market_liquidity, league_quality
Backend Unit: Premier League (league_id:39) → tier 1, PRIORITY_MATCH, score >= 80
Backend Unit: Botswana Premier League (league_id:561) → tier 4, EXOTIC_LEAGUE_WARNING
Backend Unit: Belarus Reserve League → tier 4, is_exotic == True
Backend Unit: La Liga (league_id:140) → tier 1
Backend Unit: filter_and_prioritize returns selected ordered by score desc
Backend Unit: filter_and_prioritize cascade_used contains tier 1
Frontend: Login with demo@valuebet.app / demo1234 successful
Frontend: Dashboard loads with Spanish UI (Fútbol sport selected by default)
Frontend: 4 pick-quality-badge elements rendered on pick cards
Frontend: 2 badges display PRIORIDAD (emerald, T1·92, T1·89)
Frontend: 1 badge displays LIQUIDEZ ALTA (cyan, T2·76)
Frontend: 1 badge displays ESTÁNDAR (slate, T2·62)
Frontend: All badges show tier and score format (T1·92, etc.)
Frontend: group-skipped-low-relevance section exists at bottom of Dashboard
Frontend: Skipped section contains 4 skipped-row elements
Frontend: Row 0: Gaborone United vs Township Rollers, Botswana Premier League, Tier 4, 18/100, LIGA EXÓTICA badge, reason paragraph
Frontend: Row 1: FC Minsk Reserves vs Dinamo Brest Reserves, Belarus Reserve League, Tier 4, 12/100, LIGA EXÓTICA badge, reason paragraph
Frontend: Row 2: Defensor vs Cerro Largo, Uruguay Segunda División, Tier 4, 28/100, MERCADO DÉBIL badge, reason paragraph
Frontend: Row 3: Cracovia vs Lechia, Ekstraklasa, Tier 3, 32/100, DATOS BAJOS badge, reason paragraph
Frontend: All skipped rows show match label, league, tier, score, colored state badge, and reason paragraph
Frontend: Existing groups verified - group-high (3 items), group-medium (1 item), group-discarded-motivation (1 item), group-discarded-market (1 item), group-incomplete (1 item)
Frontend: Language toggle ES/EN works correctly
Frontend: Spanish badges: PRIORIDAD, LIQUIDEZ ALTA, ESTÁNDAR, LIGA EXÓTICA, MERCADO DÉBIL, DATOS BAJOS
Frontend: English badges: PRIORITY, HIGH LIQUIDITY, STANDARD, EXOTIC LEAGUE, WEAK MARKET, LOW DATA
Frontend: Skipped section title changes: 'Saltados — baja relevancia' (ES) → 'Skipped — low relevance' (EN)
Frontend: Spanish remains default language on page load

success_percentage.backend: 98% (49/50 tests passed - 1 minor issue in football_competitions.py substring matching, corrected by football_quality.py layer)
success_percentage.frontend: 100% (all UI elements, badges, skipped section, language toggle verified)
success_percentage.integration: 100% (API data correctly propagated to UI, all Phase 8 metadata displayed)

football_quality_py.filter_and_prioritize: selected 2, skipped 2, cascade [1], ordered by score desc

football_competitions_py.issue: Botswana Premier League substring matches to tier_1

rows.match: FC Minsk Reserves vs Dinamo Brest Reserves
